title: Local Variable and Method Parameter Names Should Comply with a Naming Convention
description: Adhering to a consistent naming convention helps to make the code more readable and understandable, which makes it easier to maintain and debug. It also ensures consistency in the code, especially when multiple developers are working on the same project. This rule checks that local variable and method parameter names match a provided regular expression.
recommendation: Ensure that local variable and method parameter names match the provided regular expression. Consistent naming helps in understanding the code, identifying errors, and maintaining the codebase. It also improves collaboration among team members.
impact: Inconsistent naming of local variables and method parameters can lead to several issues such as reduced readability, difficulty in identifying variables, increased risk of errors, collaboration difficulties, and difficulty in code maintenance.

checks.message: Ensure that local variable and method parameter names match the provided regular expression. Consistent naming helps in understanding the code, identifying errors, and maintaining the codebase. It also improves collaboration among team members.
